# Anna Ermilina — Senior Frontend Engineer

> Senior Frontend Engineer with 7+ years in the React ecosystem. Next.js architecture, large-scale platform migrations, Core Web Vitals optimization, LLM-powered features. Based in Belgrade, Serbia. Open to senior frontend roles, remote.

## About

- 7+ years in JavaScript/TypeScript: React, Next.js (App/Pages Router), TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, TanStack Query
- Performance: Core Web Vitals optimization, SSR/SSG strategies, schema.org structured data (JSON-LD)
- AI: LLM API integration (Gemini, Claude), AI-assisted development workflows (Cursor, Claude)
- Languages: Russian (native), English (B2)

## Experience

- Senior Frontend Developer, OOO "Za Rulem" (ZR.RU), 2019–present. Sole frontend engineer; led migration from legacy stacks to Next.js; built a 76+ component library; achieved Lighthouse Performance 95/100 with zero CLS and 2.4s LCP on throttled slow 4G; Keycloak auth customization; JSON-LD structured data.
- Frontend Developer (contract), OOO KP-IT, 2024–present. Internal statistics dashboard, touch-optimized kiosk library, SSR coupon hub for a marketing campaign.

## Education

- Engineer, Moscow Aviation Institute (MAI), 2005–2011
- Linguist-Translator, MAI Institute of Foreign Languages, 2008–2011
- Google AI Essentials Certificate; Meta Front-End Professional Certificate
